clinicalProblem.clinicalIntent: Identify masked uncontrolled hypertension in treated adults with normal office BP
clinicalProblem.whenToUse: Adults on antihypertensive medication with office SBP <130 mm Hg and DBP <80 mm Hg
clinicalProblem.decisionOrAction: Exclude masked uncontrolled hypertension using out-of-office BP monitoring

navigationPath.purpose: Verify patient on antihypertensive meds + office BP <130/80
Provide device setup and measurement protocol
Determine if masked uncontrolled hypertension is excluded or confirmed
Recommend next steps based on results

validationRules: Patient must be on antihypertensive medication
Out-of-office readings must follow standardized protocol

rules: Check eligibility: on meds + office SBP <130 + office DBP <80
Present recommendation with COR 2b (WEAK) + LOE B-NR (Moderate-quality nonrandomized evidence)
Offer out-of-office BP monitoring (ABPM or HBPM)
Compare out-of-office readings to office readings
If out-of-office BP ≥130/80 → masked uncontrolled hypertension confirmed
If out-of-office BP <130/80 → masked uncontrolled hypertension excluded
Decision is 'reasonable to consider' not mandatory due to COR 2b

categories.name: True Controlled Hypertension
categories.action: Exclude masked uncontrolled hypertension, continue current management

cor.phrasing: May/might be reasonable / May/might be considered

loe.source: 1 or more nonrandomized studies, observational studies, or registry studies

category.description: 'Masked Uncontrolled Hypertension Confirmed' or 'Masked Uncontrolled Hypertension Excluded'

crisis.description: false - this is not a crisis condition

thresholds.sbp: N/A - masked hypertension is not a crisis condition

appDisplay.behavior: Normal routing with shared decision-making due to weak recommendation

nextStepRouting.providerSuggestion: Consider out-of-office BP monitoring (ABPM or HBPM) to exclude masked uncontrolled hypertension
nextStepRouting.followUpTiming: Repeat assessment annually or with medication changes
nextStepRouting.repeatMeasurement: Confirm with multiple out-of-office readings if initial result equivocal
nextStepRouting.navigatorEscalation: Flag confirmed masked uncontrolled hypertension for medication review
nextStepRouting.documentation: Log COR 2b recommendation, monitoring method used, and final classification
